events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, medium risk. Undersized overload heaters/relays don't meet NEC 430.32 FLA-based sizing, causing nuisance tripping — and the real danger is that nuisance tripping tempts personnel to oversize or bypass the overloads, which would remove genuine motor/conductor thermal protection. Correction path: verify nameplate FLA, select correct heater/relay size per 430.32(A)(1)/(C), and functionally trip-test before energizing.
